title: dryopteris scabrosa
intro: Dryopteris scabrosa, also known as Scabrous Wood Fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, due to its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-tussive agent. Dryopteris scabrosa can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
